traits.summary: Gain Heroic Inspiration after each Long Rest and one extra Origin feat.
traits.description: You gain Heroic Inspiration when you finish a Long Rest. You also gain one extra Origin feat of your choice at 1st level.

traits.summary: Gain proficiency in one additional skill.
traits.description: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

traits.summary: Humans are exceptionally adaptable at level 1.
traits.description: You gain an extra Origin feat at character creation in addition to the feat granted by your background.

flavorText: Humans are the most widespread people in the worlds of D&D. Their adaptability, ambition, and curiosity let them thrive in nearly any land or culture. They are defined less by ancestry and more by the paths they choose.
roleplayNotes: Pick a homeland, tradition, or personal drive that explains your flexibility—humans can fit into almost any social role.
